---
params:
  county: "Salt Lake"
  data_dir: "data/remotes"
format:
  typst:
    margin:
      x: 0.4in
      y: 0.35in
    fontsize: 8pt
---

```{=typst}
#set page(flipped: true)
#set text(font: "Poppins", size: 8pt, number-type: "lining", number-width: "tabular")
#set par(spacing: 0pt, leading: 0.5em)
```

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(yaml)

settings    <- yaml::read_yaml("config/settings.yml")
report_data <- readRDS(file.path(params$data_dir, "report_data.rds"))
tract_maps  <- readRDS(file.path(params$data_dir, "tract_maps.rds"))

county_data <- dplyr::filter(report_data, county == params$county) |>
  dplyr::arrange(GEOID)

county_maps <- tract_maps[county_data$GEOID]
```

```{r}
#| label: save-maps
#| include: false
map_dir <- file.path(params$data_dir, "map_cache")
dir.create(map_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

map_paths <- purrr::imap_chr(county_maps, function(map, geoid) {
  path <- file.path(map_dir, paste0("d_", geoid, ".png"))
  ggplot2::ggsave(
    filename = path,
    plot     = map,
    width    = settings$map_width_in,
    height   = settings$detail_map_height_in,
    dpi      = 200,
    bg       = "white"
  )
  path
})
```

```{r}
#| label: pages
#| results: asis
#| echo: false

# ── Palette ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
teal       <- "#003B4F"
teal_mid   <- "#0E5C72"
teal_soft  <- "#3E7E91"
sky        <- "#7EC8E3"
amber      <- "#C77B30"
key_tint   <- "#F1F7F8"
panel_fill <- "#F7FAFB"
line_cool  <- "#CADDE2"
hair       <- "#EEF3F4"
ink        <- "#16272D"
body_c     <- "#3C4A4F"
muted_c    <- "#7A848A"
track      <- "#E4ECEE"

# ── Generic helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fmt_val <- function(x, digits = 1, suffix = "", big_mark = "") {
  if (length(x) == 0 || is.na(x)) return("—")
  if (is.numeric(x) && !is.finite(x)) return("—")
  rounded <- round(x, digits)
  if (digits == 0 && nchar(big_mark) > 0) {
    return(paste0(format(as.integer(rounded), big.mark = big_mark, scientific = FALSE), suffix))
  }
  paste0(format(rounded, scientific = FALSE), suffix)
}

col_val <- function(data, col) {
  if (col %in% names(data)) data[[col]] else NA_real_
}

oz_color <- function(cls) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    grepl("Likely to attract",   cls, ignore.case = TRUE) &
      !grepl("More|Less|Un",     cls, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "#15705A",
    grepl("More likely",         cls, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "#2F8FB0",
    grepl("Less likely",         cls, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "#D98A3D",
    grepl("Unlikely|not likely", cls, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "#B4532E",
    TRUE ~ "#9AA3A8"
  )
}

oz_class_short <- function(cls) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    grepl("Likely to attract",   cls, ignore.case = TRUE) &
      !grepl("More|Less|Un",     cls, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Likely",
    grepl("More likely",         cls, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "More Likely",
    grepl("Less likely",         cls, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Less Likely",
    grepl("Unlikely|not likely", cls, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Unlikely",
    TRUE ~ "Unknown"
  )
}

# ── Typst building blocks ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# Horizontal progress bar — pure paste0, no sprintf %
tbar <- function(pct_val, bar_color, h = "4pt", r = "2pt") {
  if (is.null(pct_val) || is.na(pct_val) || !is.finite(as.numeric(pct_val))) {
    return(paste0('#block(width: 100%, height: ', h, ', fill: rgb("', track, '"), radius: ', r, ')[]'))
  }
  fp  <- min(max(as.numeric(pct_val), 0), 100)
  fpp <- paste0(format(round(fp, 1), nsmall = 1), "%")   # e.g. "34.7%"
  paste0(
    '#block(width: 100%, height: ', h, ', fill: rgb("', track, '"), radius: ', r, ')',
    '[#block(width: ', fpp, ', height: ', h, ', fill: rgb("', bar_color, '"), radius: ', r, ')[]]'
  )
}

# Panel section header: teal uppercase + cool hairline
phdr <- function(label) {
  paste0(
    '#block(width: 100%, inset: (x: 6pt, top: 4pt, bottom: 0pt), below: 0pt)',
    '[#text(fill: rgb("', teal, '"), weight: "bold", size: 7pt, tracking: 0.6pt)[',
    toupper(label), ']]',
    '#v(1pt)',
    '#line(length: 100%, stroke: (paint: rgb("', line_cool, '"), thickness: 0.75pt))'
  )
}

# KV row: label left / value right, hairline below
mkv <- function(label, value) {
  paste0(
    '#block(inset: (x: 6pt, y: 2.5pt), width: 100%)',
    '[#grid(columns: (1fr, auto), gutter: 2pt,',
    '[#text(fill: rgb("', body_c, '"), size: 6.5pt)[', label, ']],',
    '[#text(fill: rgb("', ink,    '"), size: 8pt, weight: "semibold")[', value, ']])]',
    '#line(length: 100%, stroke: (paint: rgb("', hair, '"), thickness: 0.5pt))'
  )
}

# KV row with bar below label/value
mkv_bar <- function(label, value, bar_pct, bar_color = teal) {
  paste0(
    '#block(inset: (x: 6pt, top: 2pt, bottom: 1pt), width: 100%)',
    '[#grid(columns: (1fr, auto), gutter: 2pt,',
    '[#text(fill: rgb("', body_c, '"), size: 6.5pt)[', label, ']],',
    '[#text(fill: rgb("', ink,    '"), size: 8pt, weight: "semibold")[', value, ']])',
    '#v(1.5pt)', tbar(bar_pct, bar_color), ']',
    '#line(length: 100%, stroke: (paint: rgb("', hair, '"), thickness: 0.5pt))'
  )
}

# Panel box wrapper: panel-fill background, cool border, 5pt radius
panel_box <- function(header_str, body_str) {
  paste0(
    '#block(fill: rgb("', panel_fill, '"), ',
    'stroke: (paint: rgb("', line_cool, '"), thickness: 0.75pt), ',
    'radius: 5pt, inset: 0pt, clip: true, width: 100%)',
    '[', header_str, body_str, ']'
  )
}

# Key measure card for the Four Key Measures band
key_card <- function(top_color, label_upper, value_str, unit_str, bar_pct_val, caption_str, bar_color) {
  fp  <- if (!is.null(bar_pct_val) && !is.na(bar_pct_val) && is.finite(as.numeric(bar_pct_val)))
           min(max(as.numeric(bar_pct_val), 0), 100) else NULL
  bar_t <- if (!is.null(fp)) {
    fpp <- paste0(format(round(fp, 1), nsmall = 1), "%")
    paste0(
      '#block(width: 100%, height: 4pt, fill: rgb("', track, '"), radius: 2pt)',
      '[#block(width: ', fpp, ', height: 4pt, fill: rgb("', bar_color, '"), radius: 2pt)[]]'
    )
  } else {
    paste0('#block(width: 100%, height: 4pt, fill: rgb("', track, '"), radius: 2pt)[]')
  }
  unit_t <- if (nchar(unit_str) > 0)
    paste0('#h(2pt)#text(fill: rgb("', body_c, '"), size: 9pt)[', unit_str, ']')
  else ""

  paste0(
    '#block(fill: rgb("', key_tint, '"), stroke: 0.75pt + rgb("', line_cool, '"), ',
    'radius: 5pt, inset: 0pt, clip: true, width: 100%)',
    '[#block(height: 3pt, width: 100%, fill: rgb("', top_color, '"))[]',
    '#block(inset: (x: 6pt, top: 4pt, bottom: 5pt), width: 100%)',
    '[#text(fill: rgb("', teal, '"), size: 7pt, weight: "bold", tracking: 0.6pt)[', label_upper, ']',
    '#v(2pt)',
    '#text(fill: rgb("', ink, '"), size: 21pt, weight: "bold")[', value_str, ']',
    unit_t,
    '#v(3pt)',
    bar_t,
    '#v(3pt)',
    '#text(fill: rgb("', muted_c, '"), size: 6.5pt)[', caption_str, ']',
    ']]'
  )
}

# ── Per-tract page generator ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
tract_page <- function(tract, map_path, is_first) {
  g  <- function(col)                          col_val(tract, col)
  fv <- function(col, d = 1, s = "", m = "")  fmt_val(g(col), d, s, m)

  county_str <- as.character(g("county"))
  geoid_str  <- as.character(g("GEOID"))
  acres_str  <- fv("total_acres", 0, m = ",")

  oz_cls_raw    <- if (is.na(g("oztoolclassification"))) NA_character_
                   else as.character(g("oztoolclassification"))
  oz_fill       <- if (is.na(oz_cls_raw)) paste0('"', muted_c, '"')
                   else paste0('"', oz_color(oz_cls_raw), '"')
  oz_lbl        <- if (is.na(oz_cls_raw)) "N/A" else oz_class_short(oz_cls_raw)

  mfi_raw <- g("mfi")
  mfi_str <- if (is.na(mfi_raw) || !is.finite(as.numeric(mfi_raw))) "—"
             else paste0("\\$", format(as.integer(mfi_raw), big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE))

  pvrty_str <- if (is.na(g("pvrty_r"))) "—" else as.character(g("pvrty_r"))
  unmpl_str <- if (is.na(g("unmpl_r"))) "—" else as.character(g("unmpl_r"))

  pb <- if (!is_first) "#pagebreak()\n" else ""

  proj_root <- gsub("\\\\", "/", normalizePath(getwd()))
  map_abs   <- gsub("\\\\", "/", normalizePath(map_path))
  map_fwd   <- sub(paste0("^", proj_root, "/?"), "", map_abs)

  # ── Header band ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  hdr_left <- paste0(
    '#rect(fill: white, inset: (x: 5pt, y: 4pt), radius: 2pt)',
    '[#text(fill: rgb("', teal, '"), weight: "bold", size: 6pt)[WFRC#linebreak()MAG]]',
    '#h(0.1in)',
    '#text(fill: white, weight: "bold", size: 15pt)[', county_str, ' County]',
    '#text(fill: rgb("', sky,  '"), size: 8pt)[ · Opportunity Zone 2.0]',
    '#linebreak()',
    '#text(fill: rgb("', sky,  '"), size: 7pt)[Census Tract ', geoid_str,
    ' · ', acres_str, ' acres]'
  )
  hdr_right <- paste0(
    '#align(right)',
    '[#text(fill: rgb("', sky, '"), size: 5.5pt, tracking: 1pt)[INVESTMENT LIKELIHOOD]',
    '#linebreak()#v(3pt)',
    '#box(fill: rgb(', oz_fill, '), radius: 3pt, inset: (x: 8pt, y: 4pt))',
    '[#text(fill: white, weight: "bold", size: 8pt)[', oz_lbl, ']]',
    '#linebreak()#v(2pt)',
    '#text(fill: rgb("', sky, '"), size: 5.5pt)[Urban Institute OZ Tool]',
    ']'
  )
  hdr_band <- paste0(
    '#block(width: 100%, fill: rgb("', teal, '"), inset: (x: 0.15in, y: 0.06in), below: 0pt)',
    '[#grid(columns: (1fr, auto), gutter: 0.12in, align: left + top,',
    '[', hdr_left, '],[', hdr_right, '])]'
  )

  sky_rule <- paste0(
    '#line(length: 100%, stroke: (paint: rgb("', sky, '"), thickness: 1.5pt))'
  )

  # ── Four Key Measures band ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  muc_pct <- g("wc_muc_pct")
  ato_val <- g("ato_composite")
  sap_val <- g("sap_planned_hh_per_acre")
  eru_val <- g("eru_per_acre")

  sap_bar <- if (!is.na(sap_val) && is.finite(sap_val)) min(sap_val / 35 * 100, 100) else NA_real_
  eru_bar <- if (!is.na(eru_val) && is.finite(eru_val)) min(eru_val / 10 * 100, 100) else NA_real_

  c1 <- key_card(teal,      "MUORC CENTER COVERAGE",    fv("wc_muc_pct", 1),              "%",     muc_pct, "% of tract in metro / urban / city center", teal)
  c2 <- key_card(teal_mid,  "ACCESS TO OPPORTUNITIES",  fv("ato_composite", 1),            "/100",  ato_val, "composite drive + transit index",           teal_mid)
  c3 <- key_card(teal_soft, "SAP PLANNED HOUSING",      fv("sap_planned_hh_per_acre", 1),  "HH/ac", sap_bar, "station area plan, planned units",          teal_soft)
  c4 <- key_card(amber,     "PROJECTED GROWTH 2027-37", fv("eru_per_acre", 1),             "ERU/ac",eru_bar, "equivalent residential units added",        amber)

  fkm <- paste0(
    '#text(fill: rgb("', amber, '"), weight: "bold", size: 6.5pt, tracking: 1.4pt)[FOUR KEY MEASURES]',
    '#v(2pt)',
    '#grid(columns: (1fr, 1fr, 1fr, 1fr), gutter: 0.08in,',
    '[', c1, '],[', c2, '],[', c3, '],[', c4, '])'
  )

  # ── Col 2: Tract Profile panel ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  kv2 <- function(l1, v1, l2, v2) {
    paste0(
      '#grid(columns: (1fr, 1fr), gutter: 0pt,',
      '[', mkv(l1, v1), '],[', mkv(l2, v2), '])'
    )
  }
  profile_body <- paste0(
    kv2("Population",      fv("pop",         0, m = ","),
        "Households",      fv("hh",          0, m = ",")),
    kv2("Total acres",     fv("total_acres", 1),
        "Developable",     fv("dev_acres",   1)),
    kv2("OZ 1.0 overlap",  paste0(fv("oz1_acres", 1), " ac"),
        "OZ 1.0 % of tract", fv("oz1_pct",  1, "%"))
  )
  profile_panel <- panel_box(phdr("TRACT PROFILE"), profile_body)

  # ── Col 2: Centers & Districts panel ──────────────────────────────────────────
  center_defs <- list(
    list(col = "wc_pct_metropolitan_center", lbl = "Metropolitan Ctr", clr = "#bc5f8c"),
    list(col = "wc_pct_urban_center",        lbl = "Urban Ctr",        clr = "#ec8369"),
    list(col = "wc_pct_city_center",         lbl = "City Ctr",         clr = "#f5b86e"),
    list(col = "wc_pct_neighborhood_center", lbl = "Neighborhood Ctr", clr = "#fae55c"),
    list(col = "wc_pct_employment_district", lbl = "Employment Dist.",  clr = "#d4a5c9"),
    list(col = "wc_pct_industrial_district", lbl = "Industrial Dist.",  clr = "#b8a8d8"),
    list(col = "wc_pct_retail_district",     lbl = "Retail Dist.",      clr = "#f4b8bb")
  )
  centers_body <- paste0(
    mkv_bar("MUorC total (Metro + Urban + City)", fv("wc_muc_pct", 1, "%"), muc_pct, teal),
    paste0(vapply(center_defs, function(d) {
      mkv_bar(d$lbl, fv(d$col, 1, "%"), g(d$col), d$clr)
    }, character(1)), collapse = "")
  )
  centers_panel <- panel_box(phdr("CENTERS & DISTRICTS (% OF TRACT)"), centers_body)

  # ── Col 3: Housing panel ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  housing_body <- paste0(
    mkv("Total units",    fv("units_total",     0, m = ",")),
    mkv("Res. acres",     fv("res_acres_total", 1)),
    mkv("SFD acres",      fv("res_acres_sfd",   1)),
    mkv("MF / SFA acres", fv("res_acres_mf_sfa",1)),
    '#block(height: 2pt)[]',
    '#line(length: 100%, stroke: (paint: rgb("', line_cool, '"), thickness: 0.75pt))',
    mkv("Poverty rate",          pvrty_str),
    mkv("Unemployment",          unmpl_str),
    mkv("Median family income",  mfi_str)
  )
  housing_panel <- panel_box(phdr("HOUSING & DEMOGRAPHICS"), housing_body)

  # ── Col 3: Transit panel ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  transit_body <- paste0(
    mkv("Rail / BRT stops",   fv("transit_stop_count", 0)),
    mkv("SAP acres",          fv("sap_acres",          1)),
    mkv_bar("SAP % of tract", fv("sap_pct", 1, "%"), g("sap_pct"), teal_soft),
    mkv("ATO jobs (transit)", fv("ato_jobtransit", 0, m = ",")),
    mkv("ATO HHs (transit)",  fv("ato_hhtransit",  0, m = ","))
  )
  transit_panel <- panel_box(phdr("TRANSIT"), transit_body)

  # ── Col 3: Auto Access panel ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
  auto_body <- paste0(
    mkv("Freeway exits",   fv("freeway_exit_count", 0)),
    mkv("ATO jobs (auto)", fv("ato_jobauto", 0, m = ",")),
    mkv("ATO HHs (auto)",  fv("ato_hhauto",  0, m = ","))
  )
  auto_panel <- panel_box(phdr("AUTO ACCESS"), auto_body)

  # ── Col 3: Projected Growth panel ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  growth_body <- paste0(
    mkv("Households added", fv("hh_added",   0, m = ",")),
    mkv("Population added", fv("pop_added",  0, m = ",")),
    mkv("Jobs added",       fv("jobs_added", 0, m = ",")),
    mkv("ERU added",        fv("eru_added",  0, m = ",")),
    mkv_bar("ERU / acre",   fv("eru_per_acre", 2), eru_bar, amber)
  )
  growth_panel <- panel_box(phdr("PROJECTED GROWTH 2027-37"), growth_body)

  # ── Col 3: transit+auto side-by-side grid ────────────────────────────────────
  transit_auto <- paste0(
    '#grid(columns: (1fr, 1fr), gutter: 0.08in,',
    '[', transit_panel, '],[', auto_panel, '])'
  )

  # ── Footer ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  footer <- paste0(
    '#line(length: 100%, stroke: (paint: rgb("', hair, '"), thickness: 0.5pt))',
    '#v(1pt)',
    '#grid(columns: (1fr, auto), gutter: 4pt,',
    '[#text(fill: rgb("', muted_c, '"), size: 5.5pt)',
    '[Sources: Federal OZ 2.0 eligibility, Urban Institute OZ Tool, WFRC/MAG regional data. Growth projections 2027-2037.]],',
    '[#text(fill: rgb("', muted_c, '"), size: 5.5pt)',
    '[ATO = Access to Opportunities · ERU = Equiv. Residential Unit · SAP = Station Area Plan · MUorC = Metro/Urban/City Center]])'
  )

  # ── Assemble full page ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  main_grid <- paste0(
    '#grid(columns: (3.6in, 3.0in, 1fr), gutter: 0.12in, align: top,',
    '[#image("', map_fwd, '", width: 100%)],',
    '[#stack(dir: ttb, spacing: 0.06in,',
    '[', profile_panel, '],[', centers_panel, '])],',
    '[#stack(dir: ttb, spacing: 0.06in,',
    '[', housing_panel, '],[', transit_auto, '],[', growth_panel, '])])'
  )

  paste0(c(pb, hdr_band, sky_rule, "#v(2pt)", fkm, "#v(0.07in)", main_grid, "#v(0.03in)", footer), collapse = "\n")
}

# ── Emit one Typst block per tract ────────────────────────────────────────────
for (i in seq_len(nrow(county_data))) {
  tract <- county_data[i, ]
  geoid <- as.character(tract$GEOID)
  cat("``` {=typst}\n")
  cat(tract_page(tract, map_paths[[geoid]], i == 1))
  cat("\n```\n\n")
}
```
